clips.summary: A young adult is shown drinking from a bottle of iced tea on a balcony, with the bottle label facing the camera.
failure_reasons: The bottle label is not clearly facing the viewer in the initial shot as required.
The cap is not resting beside the bottle in the initial shot as required.
The subject is not casually dressed in a light summer t-shirt as specified.
The video contains overlay text 'Fivals' which is not requested.
The camera is not locked off at table height as required.
